m2614.description: Gate 2 execution: hourly check for approved_gate2 retirement requests. This is the ONLY step that makes deletion possible: it switches the index from its no-delete ILM policy to the delete-enabled variant, then ILM takes a compliance snapshot (wait_for_snapshot) before deleting. Safety guards: (1) index name must contain 'm2614' (scope guard against forged retirement records), (2) any legal hold whose source_index pattern matches the candidate blocks retirement, (3) a missing delete_policy on the request record causes a skip, never a default. Deploy via scripts/deploy.py which substitutes __ES_HOST__/__KIBANA_HOST__/__AUTH_HEADER__ tokens.

script.source: def buckets = ctx.payload['aggregations']['by_index']['buckets']; for (def b : buckets) { def hits = b['latest_state']['hits']['hits']; if (hits != null && hits.size() > 0 && 'approved_gate2'.equals(hits[0]['_source']['state'])) return true; } return false;

boolean wildcardMatch(String pattern, String name) { if (pattern == null || pattern.isEmpty()) return false; if (!pattern.contains('*')) return pattern.equals(name); def parts = pattern.splitOnToken('*'); int pos = 0; for (int i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) { String part = parts[i]; if (part.isEmpty()) continue; int idx = name.indexOf(part, pos); if (idx < 0) return false; if (i == 0 && !pattern.startsWith('*') && idx != 0) return false; pos = idx + part.length(); } if (!pattern.endsWith('*')) { String last = parts.length > 0 ? parts[parts.length - 1] : ''; if (!name.endsWith(last)) return false; } return true; } def buckets = ctx.payload['aggregations']['by_index']['buckets']; def holds = []; for (def b : buckets) { def hits = b['latest_state']['hits']['hits']; if (hits == null || hits.size() == 0) continue; def latest = hits[0]['_source']; String st = latest['state'] != null ? latest['state'].toString() : ''; if (st.startsWith('legal_hold')) { if (latest['source_index'] != null) { holds.add(latest['source_index'].toString()); } holds.add(latest['index_name'].toString()); } } String scope = ctx.metadata['index_scope_substring'].toString(); def approved = []; def skipped = []; for (def b : buckets) { def hits = b['latest_state']['hits']['hits']; if (hits == null || hits.size() == 0) continue; def latest = hits[0]['_source']; if (!'approved_gate2'.equals(latest['state'])) continue; String indexName = latest['index_name'].toString(); if (!indexName.contains(scope)) { skipped.add(indexName + ' (outside m2614 scope)'); continue; } boolean held = false; for (String hp : holds) { if (wildcardMatch(hp, indexName)) { held = true; break; } } if (held) { skipped.add(indexName + ' (legal hold active)'); continue; } String deletePolicy = null; for (def h : hits) { def src = h['_source']; if (src['delete_policy'] != null) { deletePolicy = src['delete_policy'].toString(); break; } } if (deletePolicy == null) { skipped.add(indexName + ' (no delete_policy on request chain)'); continue; } String requestId = indexName + '-scheduled-' + ctx.execution_time.toString(); approved.add(['@timestamp': ctx.execution_time, 'request_id': requestId, 'index_name': indexName, 'state': 'scheduled_for_deletion', 'updated_at': ctx.execution_time, 'phase_age_days': latest.phase_age_days != null ? latest.phase_age_days : 0, 'gate1_approved_by': latest.gate1_approved_by != null ? latest.gate1_approved_by : 'unknown', 'gate2_approved_by': latest.gate2_approved_by != null ? latest.gate2_approved_by : 'unknown', 'gate2_approved_at': latest.gate2_approved_at != null ? latest.gate2_approved_at : ctx.execution_time, 'delete_policy': deletePolicy, 'delete_policy_applied': true, 'watcher_id': ctx.metadata['watcher_id']]); } return ['approved': approved, 'approved_count': approved.size(), 'skipped': skipped, 'skipped_count': skipped.size()];
